roadmap_items: ROADMAP.md Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer (In Progress) -> define A2UI output contract for agent-produced presentation artifacts, add deterministic agent-side card/section/action payload generation, and provide CLI rendering fallback for the same structured payloads
scope_goal: Canonicalize materialized A2UI action order in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic, and keep the handoff aligned with ROADMAP.md Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer (In Progress) and PRODUCT_VISION.md Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI), specifically deterministic materialized action ordering, stable A2UI schemas, and CLI-first rendering of structured artifacts with Exegesis Console reuse.
tasks_completed: Updated the A2UI materialization path in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py to sort filtered actions by canonical JSON before rendering.
Added contract coverage in tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to verify the canonical ordering behavior for materialized action payloads.
Rewrote the lane metadata and packet artifacts to make the Milestone 5 / Capability 5 mapping explicit in the required handoff fields.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: PRODUCT_VISION.md Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI) -> agent emits structured presentation artifacts that are consumable by CLI first, then Exegesis Console, then future Studio UI
